markdown:
#  Change Events (Android) 
Table of Contents 
##  Permissions 
Learn which user permissions are required to take the described actions in this tool. 
#####  Important
Some actions that impact this tool are done in other Procore tools. 
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take the action with this permission level.
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take this action with this permission level AND one or more additional requirements, like[ granular permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-permissions-in-procore-and-how-do-they-work).  
| Add a Change Event Line Item to an Unapproved Commitment   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | 
  * Users also need 'Admin' level permissions to the project's Commitments tool.
  * This item can be viewed offline provided that the asset/item was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device.

 |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Add a Change Event Line Item to an Unapproved Prime Potential Change Order   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Admin' level permissions to the project's Prime Contracts tool.  |  
| Add a Change Event Line Item to an Unapproved Commitment Change Order   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Admin' level permissions to the project's Commitments tool.  |  
| Add a Related Item to a Change Event   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Configure Advanced Settings: Change Events   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Create a Commitment Change Order from a Change Event   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Admin' level permissions to the project's Commitments tool.  |  
| Create Change Events   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Create a Change Event (Legacy)   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Create a Change Event from an RFI   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Admin' level permissions to the project's RFIs tool.  |  
| Create a Commitment Potential Change Order from a Change Event   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |  Users also need one of the following permissions:
  * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.
  * 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool and added to the 'Private' drop-down list and the 'Allow Standard Level Users to Create PCOs' configuration must be selected.

 |  
| Create a Prime Contract Change Order from a Change Event   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |  Users also need one of the following permissions:
  * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Prime Contracts tool.
  * 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Prime Contracts tool.
    * The user must be added to the 'Private' drop-down list of the prime contract.
    * The 'Allow Standard Users to Create PCO's' checkbox setting must be enabled in the Prime Contracts tool Settings.
    * The project's Prime Contract tool Settings, is configured to use the two (2) or three (3) tier change orders.  
_Note:_ If the project is configured to use the one (1) tier change order setting, a user must have 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Prime Contracts tool to create a prime contract change order from a change event.

 |  
| Create a Prime Potential Change Order from a Change Event   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |  Users also need one of the following permissions:
  * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Prime Contracts tool.
  * 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Prime Contracts tool and 'Allow Standard Level Users to Create PCOs' must be enabled on the Prime Contracts tool' settings. 

 |  
| Create a Purchase Order from a Change Event   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Admin' level permissions to the project's Commitments tool.  |  
| Create a Subcontract from a Change Event   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Admin' level permissions to the project's Commitments tool.  |  
| Create Budget Changes from a Change Event   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Standard' level permissions or higher to the project's Budget tool.  |  
| Create RFQs from a Change Event   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Admin' level permissions to the project's Commitments tool.  |  
| Create a Budget Modification from a Change Event (Legacy)   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Standard' level permissions or higher to the project's Budget tool.  |  
| Delete a Change Event You Created   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Delete Any Change Event   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Edit a Change Event You Created   
  
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Edit Any Change Event   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Link a Schedule of Values Line Item to a Change Event   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Admin' level permissions to the project's Commitments tool.  |  
| Record Changes to Production Quantities in a Change Event   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Respond to an RFQ on Behalf of a Collaborator   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Standard' level permissions or higher to the project's Commitments tool.  |  
| Retrieve a Deleted Change Event   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Review RFQ Responses   
 |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need access to view the related [Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/permissions-matrix/project-level-commitments-permissions).  |  
| Review RFQ Responses and Change Status   
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need access to view the related [Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/permissions-matrix/project-level-commitments-permissions).  |  
| Search for and Apply Filters to the Change Events Tool   
 |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Submit a Quote as a Collaborator   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  Collaborators can submit a quote only after receiving an **RFQ email notification**. To get this email, the collaborator must have the following designations:
  * 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.
  * Listed as the 'Assignee' on the RFQ. 

 |  
| View a Change Event  
 |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| View and Filter RFQs   
 |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Standard' level permissions or higher to the project's Commitments tool.  |  
| Void a Change Event   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |
title: Permissions
description: This page lists the user permissions that are required to perform actions in or related to the project's Change Events tool on the Procore Android app.
